summary: Spec review accepts the bounded Core real Harbor/Lode admission spine slice.
reviewed_validation_summary: `pnpm --filter @webenvoy/core-runtime test`; `pnpm --filter @webenvoy/schemas test`; `pnpm conformance`; `pnpm typecheck`; `git diff --check`; `loom fact-chain --target . --json`; `loom verify --target . --json`; `loom suite validate --target . --item CORE-221 --json`; `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item CORE-221 --json`; `loom suite evidence validate --target . --item CORE-221 --json` passed locally.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The spec is limited to Core admission and Run Record refs-only behavior for real Harbor and Lode facts; live site execution, App UI, true writes, and raw private material remain out of scope.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: The implementation contract maps required provider, identity, runtime, resource, package-lock, and privacy checks to targeted tests and conformance validation.
